title: Animal Breeders
description: Select and breed animals according to their genealogy, characteristics, and offspring. May require knowledge of artificial insemination techniques and equipment use. May involve keeping records on heats, birth intervals, or pedigree.

tasks.text: Feed and water animals, and clean and disinfect pens, cages, yards, and hutches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe animals in heat to detect approach of estrus and exercise animals to induce or hasten estrus, if necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat minor injuries and ailments and contact veterinarians to obtain treatment for animals with serious illnesses or injuries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase and stock supplies of feed and medicines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select animals to be bred, and semen specimens to be used, according to knowledge of animals, genealogies, traits, and desired offspring characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine animals to detect symptoms of illness or injury.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build hutches, pens, and fenced yards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record animal characteristics such as weights, growth patterns, and diets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Brand, tattoo, or tag animals to allow animal identification.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for sale of animals and eggs to hospitals, research centers, pet shops, and food processing plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Place vaccines in drinking water, inject vaccines, or dust air with vaccine powder to protect animals from diseases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bathe and groom animals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Exercise animals to keep them in healthy condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust controls to maintain specific building temperatures required for animals' health and safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain logs of semen specimens used and animals bred.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inject prepared animal semen into female animals for breeding purposes, by inserting nozzle of syringe into vagina and depressing syringe plunger.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clip or shear hair on animals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Package and label semen to be used for artificial insemination, recording information such as the date, source, quality, and concentration.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Exhibit animals at shows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure specified amounts of semen into calibrated syringes, and insert syringes into inseminating guns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine semen microscopically to assess and record density and motility of gametes, and dilute semen with prescribed diluents, according to formulas.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
